reviews.author: Rentala Raghavendra
reviews.title: Good quality. Value for Money.
reviews.body: Super quality. Good product. Easy and fast installation. Quick repond Technician. Thank you KENT.

reviews.author: Jahangir Khan
reviews.title: The item is really effective
reviews.body: It is a really good product and have effectively improved our drinking water quality. The service provided by the company was also satisfactory.

reviews.author: Gopikrishna
reviews.title: Kent Supreme Plus Water Purifier: Delivery & Installation
reviews.body: The product is good. Amazon delivery superb. The installation is a big drag. had a tough time in scheduling installation. The technician comes without requisite plumbing items. Btw, learnt during a installation that you need to purchase the pre-water filter seperately.

reviews.author: naveen
reviews.title: Excellent water purifier
reviews.body: A very good and usefull product. Delivery and installation was great.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Good Product and good installation
reviews.body: Delivery is on time. The installation is hassle-free. Very good installation and the behavior of engineer is good Thankyou Amazon.
